twitch_info.title: Mayumushi - Day #2 - These patterns will be the end of me.

I had never even heard of it before
reimu should be in hall of fame

i'm back you can fluke the clear now
my dumbass moshi monster kept saying uguahubhuaghbuah
lying about your age is the smaller evil compared to companies being like "think of the children, now give us your personal information LOL"

now that im 15 i can safely say i have no fucking clue how people believed it
oi oi opi, you can't be going about failing pattern like that oi
people thought I was 17 when I was 13
and I look at my convos
why did you even like me lol
how the fuck did people like me
because you beat barrage at 6 Kappa
@romrom4444 stuff i ask myself to this day
framzo i wanna make sure of something
just to make sure the level of irony in this statement is correct
"why did you even like me lol" im still asking myself this question LUL
I know you lied about actually doing it
I know some of the lore and early wiki/blogs post
it's worse if you know I was just talking about liking someone
I have no idea where I brought that from
when i was 12 i said i had depression
and that i was curing it with memes
did I liked that one song by logic and thought it means I'm suicidal
bro i was the type of person to purposefully send a message and delete it on purpose and say "Just forget about it, okay?"
im a disgrace to actual people going through troubling times mentally
and i do apologize to all of those who are going through hard times within themselves

since he literally dmed me about them lol

and i remember not even knowing 2nd body
and bein like, wow u made something really cool

crazy last tis: every phase until phase 4 is as difficult as the original phase 4, phase 4 is nerfed slightly and phase 5 is unchanged
holy shit imagine a colonel cosplau
actually we could have phase 4 have you survive not one but THREE igmabes and the curving is more dense

nah its cuz hes a weeb
i know the lyrics as well
anyway im gonna sleep! i think
and thats cuz im also a weeb
Sorry we talking about GD and 144Hz in dms
Me and darius are having a chat about GD, 144Hz and it's implication
as soneone who play GD casually, I dont' care much about 144Hz, just think it's dumb that's it's like the equivalent of a fangame practice tool
the physics are different at different FPS in GD
so 144Hz make the game pool for your inputs more regularly ?
arent there specific jumps that are frame perfect in both 60hz and 144hz
there's inherent difficulty in learning something by only getting to there rarely
I imagine if some wild renexpatch were to be made to unlock FPS in avoidance, the clear of Mayumushi at a higher FPS would be different
yeah that's what I meant nameless, then yeah in that case 144Hz is dumb but that's the engine fault
I think it's also more impressive to beat something without practice tools than with
gd is just terribly optimized,  physics in gd isnt designed for 60+hz and bugs in some ways, u can see that because for example the trail doesn't work the way it should
I feel like in a lot of the cases, using practice tools for avoidances just removes the feeling of progression you get when you slowly learn the fight without
if the physics is fps based then game should be locked at default framerate
@Framzo only thing is bad computers for example could have significant slowdown
you can have the physics running in a separate thread and have your displaying engine run at an uncapped fps
btw i don't see anything wrong with practice tools, somehow in GD everybody uses copies of demons and practice mode and nobody complains
yeah I don't have an issue with practice tools either
if done well for simple game, like fangames and gd it can be properly implemented
fangames are p unique in that some people care about it
it's the only game I've seen where that happens
I don't share that sentiment regarding practice tool tho, I play shmups and honestly I just wish more avoidance had hitcounter/practice mode included
yeah it's mostly the decompiling part the jp community doesn't like which is understandable
but the effect is the same all the same
I think a reasonable point can be made that decompiling a game for a practice tool and recreating the boss from scratch are not the same
gamemaker feel like their creation got gutted with a bowie knife to make some makeshift monster for practice tool
but idk if I'm fit enough to make it
I feel like another problem is m*ckoh mods
yeah that's probably what plasma is concerned with too
i mean you can kinda do that without decompiling
recreating a boss from scratch you might as well missunderstand how some stuff was coded and thus make something that doesn't quite feel like it devaluating your practice
the farewell medley's structure is way too complex/nonsensical to where you could tell what's late and what's early from the gmz anyway
the thing is, if people want to spoil themselves, as long as they don't use that as a bias for their review or spoil other I personally don't care
the issue is more with sharing spoilers for me
cause that is definitely a thing that happens
i will spoil the end for max
we're kinda just okay with that possibility
cant you just use yyc and close the case?
I mean if people go out of their way to decompile to spoil themselves and then go on spoiling others I don't think they care about the game nor people experience with it, and that's a people problem
imma decompile max and find out how he ends
you can extract most stuff from a ycc game
we've not been that secretive with what's in the game anyway, people just can't tell when we're being serious and when we aren't
always bruh when i got PB
I don't know much about farewell medley apart from the trailers and I'm fine with that, the myth that it is enough to hype me for a decade
you'll only have to be hype for a couple more months
I mean I saw sunbla playtest ballons and have been hype since, I think I can survive that Vornamax
we don't have a date yet but there's not a lot of stuff that needs to be done and we're pretty on top of how that's progressing
That Darkness phase is insane. The dodges in that seem mind mindbogglingly close.

we're not including anymore new ideas
